title: Viacha Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap hits Viacha with a Z-Score of -4.23. This event has a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The current weather conditions in Viacha are extreme, with a Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 15.8 GG. This indicates a high demand for heating energy.
 The relative humidity is at 77%, which may lead to frost and further exacerbate the cold conditions. The wind speed is relatively low at 3.6 km/h.
 The combination of these factors makes the situation extremely challenging for the local population and infrastructure.
conclusion: Activate emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap in Viacha.
agri_impact: Crops at risk of frost damage
